nasb.text: They came to Balaam and said to him, “Thus says Balak the son of Zippor, ‘Let nothing, I beg you, hinder you from coming to me;

esv.text: And they came to Balaam and said to him, “Thus says Balak the son of Zippor: ‘Let nothing hinder you from coming to me,

cnv.text: 他們來到巴蘭那裡，對他說：“西撥的兒子巴勒這樣說：‘求你不要推辭不到我這裡來，

ccb.text: 他们到了巴兰那里，对他说：“西拨的儿子巴勒请你务必去一趟，
